Perry Marshall: 

Good Copy Speaks To The Bleeding Neck First.



SPG: 

I agree but it should also evoke curiosity as well. 



Headline Elements Checklist:

Curiosity

Call Out Pain Point

Promise Solution 

Specificity

Simplicity

Credibility/Address Skepticism 

Time Frame To Achieve Results Of Promise



John Carlton: 

“I’m always looking for a hook in my ads (and especially in the headlines) that will jar the reader awake. I want every ad to be the one thing he reads that stays with him all day long. He tells his friends about it. It haunts him, causes him to shake his head in wonder, gooses his brain and gets his blood flowing.” 







John Carlton One Legged Golfer:

https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/0BzduSzd89301ai1pXzBNenl1UWM



Promise Solution (And Extremely Specific): 

It’s not: “Improve Your Golf Game” or “Golf Better” or “Get a smoother swing.”

It’s: Adds 50 Yards To Your Drives, Eliminates Hooks and Slices, Slash Up To 10 Strokes From Your Game. In the post-headline, pre-body copy even more. 



Simplicity: 

If a one-legged golfer can do it, so can you.  



Curiosity: 

One Legged Golfer



Credibility/Address Skepticism 

Impossible? Not if you believe what lifelong professionals and hot new amateurs worldwide are now saying. 



Time Frame To Achieve Results of Promise: 

Almost Overnight. 









John Carlton: The Naked Girls All Laughed

https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/0BzduSzd89301ai1pXzBNenl1UWM



Curiosity:

Naked Girls, Little Pudgy Guy, Fight With 3 Enormous Bikers



Call Out Pain Point:

The opposite sex is laughing behind your back because you’re little and pudgy. 



Promise Solution (Simplicity Too): 

Their eyes are filled with nothing but awe and respect. Proven to be a man because of your fighting skills. Can kick the ass of anyone who crosses them. 



Specificity:

3 Enormous Bad-Ass Bikers. It’s not “Girls Laughed Behind His Back” it’s “The Naked Girls All Laughed Behind The Little Pudgy Guy’s Back” 



Simplicity: 

Not in the headline but early on in the lead, a few easy-to-master-secrets. 



Credibility/Address Skepticism:

Not really. 



Time Frame To Achieve Results Of Promise:

No, but pretty early into the lead promise of “pretty much overnight” again. 





 



Gin Soaked Raisins

https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/0BzduSzd89301V19NbzdtaS1fY1E



Curiosity:

Gin Soaked Raisins



Call Out Pain Point:

“Hopeless” Arthritis



Promise Solution:

Cured 



Specificity:

Kitchen Cure #619



Simplicity:

Kitchen Cure, Gin Soaked Raisins



Credibility/Address Skepticism:

No



Time Frame To Achieve Results Of Promise

No







Red Tea Detox



https://www.redteadetox.com/#



Curiosity:

Secret West African Red Tea



Call Out Pain Point:

Constantly giving in to her hunger cravings



Promise Solution:

Proven to stop hunger cravings in their tracks and help you shed one pound of fat every 72 hours. 



Specificity:

Shed one pound of fat every 72 hours. Also West African Red Tea, vs just “Red Tea” or “African Tea”



Simplicity:

Red Tea



Credibility/Address Skepticism:

“Proven” but that’s about it. 



Time Frame To Achieve Results Of Promise

One pound of fat every 72 hours. 









Single Stock Retirement Plan



https://pro.oxfordclub.com/p/PLANTO99NOSECONDOXFLTOXFDSMALAGBBRK/EOXFU798/?h=true



Curiosity:

Obscure $3 Stock 



Call Out Pain Point:

No



Promise Solution:

Deliver a multimillion dollar retirement. 



Specificity:

$3 Stock



Simplicity:

Single Stock = pretty simple, anyone can own one stock. 



Credibility/Address Skepticism:

No though the image of a professional man as the video thumbnail does help. 



Time Frame To Achieve Results Of Promise

Starting Today.

Curiosity:

Outlawed for 41 years – now LEGAL again

Launched the largest family fortune the world has ever seen



Call Out Pain Point:

No



Promise Solution:

Could return 665% in the next 12 months. 



Specificity:

665% in 12 months. 



Simplicity:

No



Credibility/Address Skepticism:

Largest Family Fortune The World Has Ever Seen 



Time Frame To Achieve Results Of Promise

12 months.
